{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231451376305935E5009754B3869"}"},"total":1500},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7245815394522645286","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看到这样的一妻多夫，太有意思了，勾人心怀，写作人，写的非常好看又棒棒杠杠滴，没看多久就看完了，请作者快快的加油更新，更重要的五星好评给作者鼓励加油更新快点，看的意味深长太上瘾了，真真真的好看看。","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"一妻多夫","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E5%A6%BB%E5%A4%9A%E5%A4%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248697754B3869%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227245815394522645286%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227175606164535643151%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E5%A6%BB%E5%A4%9A%E5%A4%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687047997,"group_id":"7175606164535643151","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCZLc6VSfeSER4ZpcqHQlcFsHh+fZH6Fll3EpUOzsC7","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3905086370103132","user_name":"禄洲府的虎星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3905086370103132","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694928067,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":fa 被男友和闺蜜背叛，求个平安签。
怎么就穿越到了末世了呢？
这世界因为天灾人祸男女比例严重失调
男多女少，12:1，女子规定必须娶夫？
丁晓萌穿越后才知道，原来她是重生了
这一世她要带夫君起飞，成就最强异能
修炼最强武技，复仇破阴谋。
组建自己的战队，建立属于自己的基地
